description: Trade Journal logger (#16). Hourly scan of all signal sidecars (alpha/confluence/regime/debate/options-flow) writes new TIER S/A/confluence/debate calls into justhodl-trades DDB with entry price + macro context. Idempotent per (symbol, strategy, date).

schedule.description: Every hour at :50 — after debate (12:15 daily), confluence, alpha, regime, options-flow all updated
